metadata.task_title: Compress a JPG to a smaller size
metadata.instruction: Open Task ID 90.jpg in Documents > Task 90 folder on Photos app. Reduce the image size to 40%
metadata.context: I have a picture but is too large to share as an email attachment. I need a smaller JPEG.

l3.rationale: Moved the mouse over the File Explorer window area.

l4.rationale: Navigated through File Explorer to Documents > Task 90, opened Task ID 90.jpg, and activated the Photos window to reach the image workspace.

l5.rationale: These navigation actions browse through the Documents > Task 90 folder and open the requested image in Photos.

l3.rationale: Clicked Save in Photos to continue saving the resized image.

l4.rationale: Saved the resized image from Photos and completed the Save As flow to create the smaller JPEG file in the chosen location.

l5.rationale: These actions invoke the save/export flow and confirm saving the edited JPEG after resizing.
